segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: One fifteen.

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: OK, so where do I go from here?
segments.zh: 好的，那我接下来往哪儿走？

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Great.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Well thank you very much.

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: You're welcome.

segments.speaker: GREG
segments.en: Bye now.

segments.speaker: JULIE
segments.en: Bye.
Good morning everyone, and welcome to the Museum of Farming Life.
segments.zh:
大家早上好，欢迎来到农耕生活博物馆。我知道这是你们第一次来，所以我想先介绍一下博物馆的背景，再简单说说你们参观时能看到什么。

我们现在站的位置是一栋大建筑的入口，这栋建筑建于1880年，原本是当地商人阿尔弗雷德·帕默的住宅，他经营帕默饼干厂。后来这栋房子被出售，1911年成了学生宿舍，1951年变成了博物馆。2005年，为了容纳博物馆的藏品，又建了一个现代化的扩建部分。

博物馆归大学所有，除了两个房间用作我们的办公室，大学使用建筑的主体部分。你们可能会看到学生进楼上课，但很遗憾，那部分不对博物馆游客开放。可惜了，因为内部建筑特色非常出众，尤其是以前用作图书馆的那个房间。

幸运的是，我们一直保持博物馆免费入场。这包括所有展厅、户外区域和特展室。我们为儿童和学生举办活动，比如博物馆俱乐部，都是免费的。那边有个捐款箱，你们可以随意捐多少都行。

我们有衣帽间，如果你们想寄存外套和包的话。和其他博物馆不同，这里允许拍照，所以你们可以随身带着相机。不过，背着沉重的背包可能不太舒服，但外套和夹克最好穿着，因为今天博物馆花园里挺冷的。

segments.en: I understand it's your first visit here, so I'd like to give you some background information about the museum and then explain a little about what you can see during your visit.
So, where we're standing at the moment is the entrance to a large building that was constructed in 1880 in the home of a local businessman, Alfred Palmer, of the Palmer biscuit factory.
It was later sold and became a hall of residence for students in 1911, and a museum in 1951.
In 2005, a modern extension was built to accommodate the museum's collections.
The museum's owned by the university, and apart from two rooms that are our offices, the university uses the main part of the building.
You may see students going into the building for lessons, but it's not open to museum visitors, I'm afraid.
It's a shame because the interior architectural features are outstanding, especially the room that used to be the library.
Luckily, we've managed to keep entry to the museum free.
This includes access to all the galleries, outdoor areas and the rooms for special exhibitions.
We run activities for children and students, such as the museum club, for which there's no charge.
We do have a donation box just over there so feel free to give whatever amount you consider appropriate.
We do have a cloakroom, if you'd like to leave your coats and bags somewhere.
Unlike other museums, photography is allowed here, so you might like to keep your cameras with you.
You might be more comfortable not carrying around heavy rucksacks, though keep your coats and jackets on as it's quite cold in the museum garden today.
I'd like to tell you about the different areas of the museum.
segments.zh:
我想给大家介绍一下博物馆的不同区域。

刚进门，在主展厅外面，有一个叫“四季”的区域。在这里，你们可以观看一段四分钟的林地动画片。它是由一群电影课程的学生专门为博物馆设计的，非常漂亮。孩子们特别喜欢，但大人也一样喜欢。

segments.en: Just inside, and outside the main gallery, we have an area called Four Seasons.
Here you can watch a four-minute animation of a woodland scene.
It was designed especially for the museum by a group of young people on a film studies course, and it's beautiful.
Children absolutely love it, but then, so do adults.

pairs.note: originally 对应最初建造的时间 1880

paraphrase.explain: 题干问博物馆建筑最初是什么，定位句提到建筑建于1880年，是当地商人的家，所以答案是B。

items.prompt: The university uses part of the museum building as

pairs.q: uses part of the museum building
pairs.p: uses the main part of the building
pairs.note: 原文中'uses the main part of the building'与题干'uses part of the museum building'几乎逐字对应，只是'part'变成了'main part'，但意思一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'the university uses the main part of the building'，其中'uses the main part of the building'与题干'uses part of the museum building'对应，因此答案选A。

items.prompt: What does the guide say about the entrance fee?

pairs.note: entrance fee 和 entry free 都表示门票费用，free 表示免费。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问导游关于门票费说了什么，定位句提到'we've managed to keep entry to the museum free'，直接对应免费。

items.prompt: What are visitors advised to leave in the cloakroom?

pairs.note: 题干和原文都用了leave，直接对应。
题干和原文都用了cloakroom，直接对应。
题干中的advised（建议）被原文中的if you'd like to（如果你想）替换，表示建议。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问游客被建议在衣帽间留下什么，原文中在提到衣帽间后说'if you'd like to leave your coats and bags'，因此答案应为coats and bags，对应选项C。

pairs.note: 题干和原文完全一致，直接定位。

paraphrase.explain: 题干中的专有名词'Four Seasons'在原文中直接出现，且首字母大写，容易定位。
